evoscientist.label: EvoScientist
evoscientist.cmd:
bash -c 'set -euo pipefail
workspace="$1"
base_prompt="$2"
repo_root="$(dirname "$(dirname "$workspace")")"
if [ -f "$repo_root/evaluation/.env" ]; then
  set -a
  . "$repo_root/evaluation/.env"
  set +a
fi
runtime_home="$(mktemp -d /tmp/researchclaw-evosci-XXXXXX)"
cleanup() { rm -rf "$runtime_home"; }
trap cleanup EXIT
export HOME="$runtime_home"
export XDG_CONFIG_HOME="$runtime_home/.config"
if [ -n "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export CUSTOM_OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY"; fi
if [ -n "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then export CUSTOM_OPENAI_BASE_URL="$OPENAI_BASE_URL"; fi
mkdir -p "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/evoscientist"
printf "%s\n" "provider: custom-openai" "model: gpt-5-chat" "default_mode: daemon" > "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/evoscientist/config.yaml"
thread_id="$(basename "$workspace")"
extra_prompt="$(cat <<EOF
### EvoScientist Path Usage
- The current working directory is already the workspace root. Use relative paths from . for all file-oriented tools.
- Allowed examples: ls(.), ls(data), ls(related_work), read_file(data/...), and writing to code/..., outputs/..., and report/....
- Do not pass the absolute workspace path to file-oriented tools.
- Do not stop after describing next steps. Continue working until report/report.md exists on disk.
- Before finishing, verify the final deliverables with file-oriented tools, including report/report.md and the generated files under report/images/.
EOF
)"
current_prompt="${base_prompt}

${extra_prompt}"
attempt=1
has_entry() {
  find "$1" -mindepth 1 -print -quit | grep -q .
}
while [ "$attempt" -le 3 ]; do
  set +e
  /mnt/shared-storage-user/yetianlin/ResearchClawBench/.venv/bin/evosci --ui cli --workdir "$workspace" --auto-approve --thread-id "$thread_id" -p "$current_prompt"
  exit_code=$?
  set -e
  missing_text=""
  if ! has_entry "$workspace/code"; then
    missing_text="${missing_text}- at least one analysis file under code/\n"
  fi
  if ! has_entry "$workspace/outputs"; then
    missing_text="${missing_text}- at least one intermediate result under outputs/\n"
  fi
  if [ ! -f "$workspace/report/report.md" ]; then
    missing_text="${missing_text}- report/report.md\n"
  fi
  if ! has_entry "$workspace/report/images"; then
    missing_text="${missing_text}- at least one generated figure under report/images/\n"
  fi
  if [ -z "$missing_text" ]; then
    exit 0
  fi
  if [ "$exit_code" -ne 0 ] || [ "$attempt" -ge 3 ]; then
    printf "[ResearchClawBench] Missing deliverables after attempt %s:\n%b" "$attempt" "$missing_text" >&2
    if [ "$exit_code" -ne 0 ]; then
      exit "$exit_code"
    fi
    exit 1
  fi
  next_attempt=$((attempt + 1))
  printf "\n[ResearchClawBench] Retrying EvoScientist continuation (attempt %s/3).\n" "$next_attempt"
  current_prompt="$(cat <<EOF
Continue the same ResearchClawBench task in the same workspace and thread. Do not restart from scratch or summarize next steps.

Required missing deliverables:
${missing_text}
Finish the missing work now. Use relative workspace paths only. Before stopping, verify the missing deliverables with file-oriented tools so the files exist on disk.

This is continuation attempt ${next_attempt}.
EOF
)"
  attempt="$next_attempt"
done' -- <WORKSPACE> <PROMPT>
